use_cases: Navigate filtered content by tags in an e-commerce product listing
Display category hierarchy in content management systems
Show topic-based filtering in blog or documentation sites
Enable quick tag-based navigation in resource libraries
ai_summary: A minimalist tag breadcrumb component for navigating filtered content by tags. Supports dark mode, optional tag counts, and responsive design. Displays tags in a horizontally scrollable container with subtle hover states, commonly used in product catalogs, content platforms, or resource directories for quick filtering and navigation.
